text.title: Test Pyramid Rebalance Playbook Decision Tree
text.summary: Routing tree from observable preconditions to a rule from 01-core-rules.xml. Every leaf references a rule id; the tree always terminates on apply-rule or skip-this-methodology.

decision-tree.root-question: Do all preconditions in Applies-If hold AND no Skip-If trigger fires?

branch.question: Is the stake high (≥$10k impact OR regulated surface OR >100 users affected)?

conclusion.verdict: apply with full discipline — every rule from 01-core-rules.xml enforced, validator on output
apply with minimum-viable rule set — primary rule enforced, validator on output

text.example: Preconditions hold; no skip-if triggered; high_stake=false → apply rule `r2-typed-input` with minimum-viable set; validator script confirms artefact passes schema.
A precondition fails (e.g. missing named owner) → branch `preconditions == false` → conclusion `skip-this-methodology` → no artefact produced; gap surfaced to requester.
